title: Senior cloud-focused Software Engineer
description:
**The job**
 We are looking for an experienced Software Engineer to join us in building our automation and communication platform. We help solve our customers communication needs by automating repetitive tasks in help desk, sales and marketing. We are looking to do a technical shift and move parts of it to kubernetes running on AWS - do you wanna be part of it from the start?
   

  

 Software is the core part of our business at Lime and we work together in a cross-functional team for the engineering teams to get the business input. Together with our Product Owners we use ShapeUp as the agile methodology. We meet regularly and decide what’s essential to the product and how it should evolve.
   

  

 The Engineers at Lime are problem solvers who strive to understand how everything fits together. We do pragmatic solutions to hard problems, a good mix of freedom and responsibility, and most importantly – have a great time at work! We are encouraged to come up with new ideas and experiment a lot. We think long-term and our ambition is to write clean and maintainable code. We take ownership of architecture and automated testing.
   

  

 We always stick to the “best tool for the problem” approach – we listen to industry trends with interest, but evaluate if something is right for us. We do things that matter to our customers and maintain a vision to stay on the right path.
   

  

**Requirements**
**Skills & Requirements**
**Our main stack**
* C#
* Vue
* TypeScript
* MS SQL
* Redis


**Its a real plus if you**
 Have experience with developing and hosting SaaS solutions on AWS, setting up and maintaining CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps) and previous experience in taking architectural responsibilities in projects
   

  

**Our process**
 We have a lightweight process using the latest Agile techniques with stable feature cycles, no deadlines and an emphasis on understanding the actual problem rather than specifications.
   

  

 Even though we try our best, our tech and processes are far from perfect. That’s why we are looking for like-minded craftspeople to join us on the journey to building a company and product we can be proud of!
   

  

**What We Offer**
* A stable and calm working environment
* Ergonomic workplace equipment
* Continuous education in the latest techs
* Promote personal skill development with various activities
* Commuter friendly offices in Stockholm, Gothenburg and Lund

title: 【キャリア採用】アプリケーションエンジニア
description:
募集背景
   

  

 アプリケーションエンジニアとして転職を考えている皆様へ
   

  

 TDSEでは、AI・機械学習を活用したアプリケーションを開発し、お客様のビジネス価値を最大化することを目指しています。
   

  

 今後より自社プロダクトサービスに経営資源を投入し、サービスラインナップを増やしておく方針です。
   

  

 このような背景の中、エンジニアにはフロント/バック両方を構築が求められ、クラウドを利用した自社プロダクトやクライアント企業向けシステムを構築しています。
   

  

 特に最近はLLMの活用やRAGの構築など生成AIを活用したシステム開発案件も増えてきています。
   

  

 WEBやAPIサーバを利用したプロダクションサービスの開発を担当する機械学習・AIエンジニアを募集しており、私たちと一緒に業界を変革する意欲的なメンバーを探しています。
   

  

 仕事内容
   

  

 TDSEにおけるAIアプリケーション開発支援サービスを担当していただきます。
   

  

* クラウドを利用したアプリケーション開発・運用
* AIや機械学習、LLMやRAGに関するWEBやAPIサーバを利用したプロダクションサービスの実装・デプロイメント
* UI/UX設計・実装


 ※AI・機械学習モデルの開発・検証は弊社データサイエンティストが行います。
   

  

 ※自社プロダクト（QAジェネレータやTDSE Eye）の開発も担当します。
   

  

 働き方
   

  

 ワークライフバランスをうまく取りながら、仕事もプライベートも楽しんでいる社員が多いのが当社の特徴の一つです。
   

  

 定時には退社できるよう会社をあげて取り組んでいます。
   

  

 業務後は先端テクノロジーのキャッチアップやスキルアップ、趣味のために時間を費やす社員も多くいます。
   

  

 社員同士でも主体的に勉強会を開催し、ポータルサイトで情報共有したり、各自スキルアップを行っています。
   

  

 35歳以下を占める割合が高く、結婚・育児とライフイベントを迎えると男性社員も育児休暇を取得し、公私ともに充実した時間を持てる環境でもあります。また、有給取得率は7割程度です。
   

  

 組織
   

  

 TDSEのエンジニアリンググループは以下の役割を担う技術者が在籍しています。
   

  

* プロジェクトマネージャ
* コンサルタント
* データエンジニア
* MLOpsエンジニア
* アプリケーションエンジニア


 アプリケーションエンジニア入社された後、データエンジニアやコンサルタントへのキャリアチェンジも可能です。
   

  

 応募要件
   

  

 MUST
   

  

* プログラミング言語に精通 (Python歓迎,実務経験3年以上)
* クラウドサービス（AWS、GCP、Azure等）の利用経験
* WEBアプリケーション開発経験（フロントエンド・バックエンド）
* コミュニケーション能力、チームワーク


 ※ 経験が少し不足している場合でも、オンライン教育や書籍などでスキルアップを支援します。面接時にご質問ください。
   

  

 ※ フロント/バック、クラウドなど幅が広いため、部分的な実装からスタートも可能です。ご相談ください。
   

  

 WANT
   

  

* データベースの設計経験
* 機械学習、統計学の知識
* MLOpsの基本的な知識・経験
* フレームワーク（React, Vue.js, Angular等）の利用経験
* コンテナ技術・コンテナオーケストレーション(Kubernetes等)技術の利用経験
* CI/CDパイプラインの構築・運用経験
* セキュリティ対策・非機能要件の知識・経験


 求める人物像
   

  

* ミッション「データに基づいて意思決定を高度化する」に共感いただける方
* 自ら考え、自ら動ける人
* データ利活用の仕組みをつくることに興味がある人
* 向学心があり、新しい事柄やコミュニティに臆さず取り組める方
* 社会や顧客の課題を自分事と捉え、全力を出して最後までやり切る人
* 仲間と共に未知の事にもチャレンジできる人


 労働条件
   

  

 職種： エンジニア職（アプリケーションエンジニア)※PL経験者歓迎します 雇用形態： 正社員 試用期間： 有 （6ヶ月） ※ 試用期間中の勤務条件に変更無 給与： 年収500万円～800万円 ※年収はスキル・経験に応じて優遇いたします 昇給： 年2回（6月・12月） 業績賞与： 年2回（6月・12月）※会社業績による 諸手当： みなし残業代:月30時間の固定残業代を支給
   

  

 ※みなし残業時間（固定残業代分）超える時間外労働分は別途支給
   

  

 休日出勤手当、深夜勤務手当、通勤費全額支給 試用期間： 有（6ヶ月）※試用期間中の勤務条件に変更無 勤務時間： 9:00～18:00（休憩12:00～13:00）勤務時間8時間/日
   

  

 ※ただし、業務に支障のない限り17:30まで

title: Territory Account Manager
description:
**Company Description**  

As a Teritory Account Manager at Check Point, you'll play a pivotal role in cybersecurity innovation, emphasizing partner collaboration.



You'll shape the digital security landscape within a culture that champions cutting-edge solutions, creativity, and collaboration.



Our environment prioritizes continuous learning, and your role will directly contribute to securing businesses and safeguarding organizations from evolving cyber threats.



With global cooperation opportunities and a clear path for career growth, Check Point is more than just a workplace; it's a community where your skills and dedication are not only recognized but highly valued.



Join us and be part of shaping the future of digital security through channel collaboration excellence.

 **Job Description**  

* + **Optimize Partner Relationships:** Cultivate strong ties, serve as the primary contact, and identify upselling opportunities for enhanced channel engagement.
	+ **Execute Sales Strategies:** Develop and implement targeted strategies to surpass channel sales targets.
	+ **Collaborate for** **Partner Success:** Work seamlessly with internal teams to ensure effective program execution.
	+ **Tailored Channel Plans:** Create customized plans aligned with each partner's unique goals.
	+ **Timely Updates and Communication:** Provide partners with prompt updates on products, features, and industry trends, facilitating clear communication.
	+ **Issue Resolution Expertise:** Address and resolve partner issues promptly to maintain high satisfaction levels.
	+ **Stay Informed on Trends:** Keep abreast of channel and cybersecurity trends for informed decision-making.
	+ **Negotiate and Renew Agreements:** Skilfully negotiate and renew channel agreements, fostering lasting partnerships.

  

  

**Qualifications**  

* + Minimum of 5 years in successful sales roles within an ICT company.
	+ Bachelor’s degree in business, Marketing, or a related field.
	+ Proven track record in cultivating robust channel partner relationships and achieving sales targets.
	+ Exceptional communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills with sensitivity to partner needs.
	+ Proficient presentation skills for engaging various audiences.
	+ Strong understanding of cloud technologies.
	+ Ability to thrive in a collaborative, fast-paced environment.
	+ Willingness to travel, including attendance at events supporting channel and partner engagements.
company_description: Check Point Software Technologies Ltd. is a leading provider of cyber security solutions to governments and corporate enterprises globally.

title: Data Warehouse Officer - based in Luxembourg
description:
**This position is based at our Luxembourg headquarters and requires regular office presence.** 
 The EIB offers you the opportunity to live and work in a truly international and multi-cultural environment. We also offer relocation support.
   

  

 The
 **EIB** 
 , the European Union's bank, is seeking to recruit for Group Information Systems Directorate (GIS), Data & Corporate Solutions Department (DCS), Data Management Division (DM), Data Engineering Unit (DE), at its headquarters in Luxembourg, a
 ****Data Warehouse Officer\*****
**.**
**This is a full-time permanent position at grade 5.**
* internal benchmark Officer IT Applications


***Panel interviews are foreseen as from June 2026***
 Purpose
   

  

 You will design, develop, optimise, and maintain ETL processes that supply the EIB Group’s Data Warehouse and Data Lake platforms with high‑quality data. You will play a key role in improving the performance, reliability and accuracy of these data pipelines, supporting the Bank’s strategic initiatives and ensuring alignment with industry best practices, technological developments and evolving regulatory standards.
   

  

 Operating Network
   

  

 You will report to the Head of Data Engineering Unit and works in close cooperation with IT and the Data Governance units. You will cooperate with counterparties from all directorates using the Data Warehouse and Data Lake platforms.
   

  

 You will work on a daily basis with key external parties (software vendors, providers of outsourced services, peer groups) to optimise service levels and to stay abreast of best practice.
   

  

 Accountabilities
   

  

* Ensure that the EIBG Data Warehouse and Data Lake platforms are in line with the IT policies and that qualitative and quantitative objectives are achieved and define a unified approach for developing ETL within the applications;
* Organise, structure and lead complex business requirement analysis; producing business cases to propose the best possible IT solution while remaining cost effective for the EIBG;
* Lead IT projects under own responsibility and ensuring their delivery within the planned time, scope and budget by anticipating issues and taking mitigation actions;
* Write up the project documentation such as project charter, functional design, test scripts, progress report, reviewing all technical deliverables to meet Data Warehouse Solutions unit objectives;
* Build and maintain ETL jobs according to best practices and establish metrics to monitor data extraction improvements;
* Apply technical knowledge and expertise to define, test, implement and maintain data extractions in line with requirements and in cooperation with reporting officers, data officers, data owners, source system and Data warehouse Solutions unit IT custodians;
* Provide timely support services to end-users, which includes issues resolution, root cause analysis, propose and development improvements;
* Provide expert advice and recommendations and participate on issues related to Data Warehouse and Data Lake activities with focus on data extraction improvements and associated processes to align the EIB Group with best practice;
* Participate in special initiatives that can go beyond the strict boundaries of own domain and that have a specific scope and timing, to ensure the realisation of the initiative within the set scope, time and budget.


**Qualifications**
* University degree (minimum an equivalent to a Bachelor) preferably in Information Technology, Mathematics, Finance or related fields.
* At least 5 years of relevant experience in IT, including experience covering data extraction management, ideally gained within the Data Warehouse/ Data Lake fields in the financial services sector and in an international context.
* Excellent knowledge of project management principles, methods and practices.
* Strong working experience in Public Cloud environments (AWS, GCP, Azure, …).
* Strong technical knowledge of ETL tools (such as IBM Infosphere Datastage, Talend, Informatica, …) and reporting tools (MS-Power BI or equivalent).
* Strong technical knowledge of Data Lake solutions (such as MS-Data Fabric, Amazon Data Lake, Databricks, Snowflakes,…).
* Experience with creating, testing and implementing business rules for feeding an Enterprise data warehouse.
* Experience with establishing data extraction performance metrics and preventative controls for continuous improvement.
* Proven track record of data extraction improvement and result orientation.
* Good knowledge of big data storage systems (Azure storage account, Lakehouse, Amazon S3)
* Excellent knowledge of English and/or French (\*\*\*), with a good command of the other. (Knowledge of other EU languages would be an advantage).


 Competencies
   

  

**Find Out More About EIB Core Behavioural Skills Here**
*(\*\*\*) Unless stated explicitly as a required qualification, a good command of French is not a pre-requisite for hire. As both English and French are however official working languages of the EIB, proficiency in both languages is a pre-requisite for your future career development. Any language clause in your contract must be fulfilled in order for you to be eligible for a promotion (either via the annual appraisal cycle or via an internal selection process). Proficiency is understood to mean the attainment of* 
*level 5 of the Inter Institutional language courses, corresponding to B1.2 of the Common European Framework of Reference for Languages (CEFRL). The Bank offers appropriate training support.*
 We hire and value talent with unique characteristics, creating a work environment where they can be themselves. We believe that Diversity, Equity and Inclusion makes us a performing and innovative organisation. We encourage all suitably qualified and eligible candidates to apply regardless of their gender identity/expression, age, racial, ethnic and cultural background, religion and beliefs, sexual orientation, disability or neurodiversity.
   

  

 If you require reasonable accommodation during the recruitment process due to a disability, neurodivergence, or a chronic health condition, please contact the EIB Recruitment team Jobs@eib.org who will manage your request appropriately.
   

  

 By applying for this position, you acknowledge the importance of maintaining the security and integrity of the Information of the EIB Group. In case of selection for the position you agree to comply with all measures (policies, controls, document classification and management) implemented by the EIB Group to prevent unauthorised disclosure of any information or any damage to the EIB Group reputation.
   

  

*This is an open campaign to consecutively fill open positions. The campaign will remain open until position is filled. Applications will be reviewed in order of receipt.*

title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is redefining how legal work gets done. Not built for lawyers, built with them. We work alongside the world’s best legal teams, who expect excellence, precision, and speed, and we hold ourselves to the same bar.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace lets legal professionals move faster, think more clearly, and operate with sharper precision. By analysing thousands of documents in minutes and powering end-to-end workflows, we cut through complexity, teams can focus on what matters: judgment, strategy, and outcomes.
   

  

 1,000+ customers across 50+ countries trust us, including Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Linklaters, White & Case, Dentons, and Barclays. We’ve scaled to
 **$100M+ in ARR** 
 , with teams across Europe, North America and APAC, and continue to expand through acquisitions including Qura, Walter AI and Graceview.
   

  

 We partner with world-class performers: including Aaron Judge and the New York Yankees, Ludvig Åberg (and his caddie), and campaigns featuring Jude Law.
   

  

 Joining Legora means three things.
   

  

* We lean in: ownership over titles, outcomes over intentions.
* We fight for excellence: high standards, direct, ego-free feedback.
* We grow together: as a team and with our customers.


 Mission before ego. Everyone contributes. No one coasts.
   

  

 If you’re driven by impact, pace, and raising the bar. This is the place.
   

  

**The role**
 As a Senior Site Reliability Engineer you'll join the founding SRE team in our Head Quarters, sitting within Foundations. You'll own critical services end-to-end and partner across engineering to raise the reliability bar for the entire platform, working closely with teams in Stockholm.
   

  

* This is a Stockholm -based, 5-day in-office role. We believe building together in person drives better outcomes.


**What You Will Be Doing**
* Build, ship, and operate foundational platform services with full ownership
* Build and maintain a high-signal observability stack (metrics, logs, traces) and translate signals into action
* Define and evolve SLIs/SLOs, alerting, and reliability reporting for critical systems
* Improve on-call and incident response, including escalation paths, coordination, and post-incident follow-ups
* Reduce toil through automation, better tooling, and improved system ergonomics
* Partner with product and platform engineers to design resilient systems and improve deployment safety


**Who You Are**
* Significant experience operating and improving production systems, including debugging under pressure and preventing repeat incidents
* Comfortable writing software and building automation to solve reliability problems
* Autonomous, with pride in the quality and resilience of the systems you ship and operate
* A systems thinker: failure modes, graceful degradation, and practical tradeoffs
* Strong observability, incident management, and on-call experience, as well as experience with cloud infrastructure and Kubernetes


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Senior Product Manager, Personalization
description:
The Personalization team makes deciding what to play next easier and more enjoyable for every listener. From Blend to Discover Weekly, we’re behind some of Spotify’s most-loved features. We built them by understanding the world of music and podcasts better than anyone else. Join us and you’ll keep millions of users listening by making great recommendations to each and every one of them.
   

  

 Spotify is building the future of music, podcasts, and audio experiences — and conversational AI is a key part of that journey. Within our Conversation Product Area, we’re creating the platform that powers intelligent, interactive experiences across Spotify.
   

  

 In this role, you’ll lead the Agent Platform — the foundation behind experiences like AI DJ, Prompted Playlists, and integrations with partners such as ChatGPT, Google Gemini, and Alexa. You’ll help bring these systems together into a unified platform that enables teams across Spotify to build consistent, high-quality conversational experiences.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Define and drive the vision, strategy, and roadmap for the Agent Platform that powers conversational experiences across Spotify
* Build a unified platform that supports features like AI DJ, Search, Prompted Playlists, and partner integrations
* Work closely with internal engineering teams to understand their needs and improve how they build and scale agent-based experiences
* Shape the tools, capabilities, and integrations the platform provides, balancing immediate product needs with long-term scalability
* Define and track metrics that measure agent performance, including quality, reliability, latency, and cost
* Partner with engineering, design, and product leaders to align priorities and deliver on shared goals
* Ensure strong observability, evaluation, and monitoring capabilities are built into the platform
* Stay up to date with advances in AI and conversational systems, and apply those insights to evolve the platform


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have 6+ years of product management experience, including work on platform, infrastructure, or developer-focused products
* You have experience working with AI or machine learning products, such as LLM-based systems or conversational experiences
* You are comfortable engaging in technical discussions and making trade-offs between different system designs
* You have experience working across teams and aligning stakeholders in complex, evolving environments
* You think deeply about developer experience and care about building tools that help others move faster
* You are comfortable working in ambiguity and helping shape product direction while delivering results
* You communicate clearly and can translate complex technical ideas into simple, compelling narratives
* You have experience with evaluation systems, agent frameworks, or similar technologies, or you’re excited to learn


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in London or Stockholm
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home


 Learn about life at Spotify
   

  

 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 Spotify transformed music listening forever when we launched in 2008. Our mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the chance to enjoy and be passionate about these creators. Everything we do is driven by our love for music and podcasting. Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.
   

  

 Our global benefits
   

  

* Extensive learning opportunities, through our dedicated team, GreenHouse.
* Flexible share incentives letting you choose how you share in our success.
* Global parental leave, six months off - for all new parents.
* All The Feels, our employee assistance program and self-care hub.
* Flexible public holidays, swap days off according to your values and beliefs.

title: Senior Enterprise Account Executive - Telco
description:
**Company Description**
 It all started in sunny San Diego, California in 2004 when a visionary engineer, Fred Luddy, saw the potential to transform how we work. Fast forward to today — ServiceNow stands as a global market leader, bringing innovative AI-enhanced technology to over 8,100 customers, including 85% of the Fortune 500®. Our intelligent cloud-based platform seamlessly connects people, systems, and processes to empower organizations to find smarter, faster, and better ways to work. But this is just the beginning of our journey. Join us as we pursue our purpose to make the world work better for everyone.
   

  

**Job Description**
 You will produce new business sales revenue from a SaaS license model. You will accomplish this through account planning, territory planning, researching prospect customers, using business development strategies and completing field-based sales activities within a defined set of prospects, territory or vertical.
   

  

**What You Get To Do In This Role**
* Develop relationships with multiple C-suite personas (e.g., CFO, CIO, COO, CDO) across all product sales
* Oversee client relationship mapping to the account team, orchestrating an account strategy while leading across a broad virtual team (Solutions Consultants, Solutions Specialist, Success resources, Partners and Marketing, etc.)
* Be a trusted advisor to your customers by understanding their business and advising on how ServiceNow can help help their IT roadmap
* Identify the right specialist/ support resources to bring into a deal, at the right time


**Qualifications**
**To be successful in this role you have:**
* 10+ years of sales experience within software OR solutions sales organization
* Experience establishing trusted relationships with current and prospective clients and other teams
* Experience producing new business, negotiate deals, and maintain healthy C-Level relationships
* Experience achieving sales targets
* Experience in leveraging or critically thinking about how to integrate AI into work processes, decision-making, or problem-solving. This may include using AI-powered tools, automating workflows, analyzing AI-driven insights, or exploring AI's potential impact on the function or industry.
* The ability to understand the "bigger picture" and our plans around IT
* Experience promoting a customer success focus in a "win as a team" environment
* Willingness to travel up to 50%


 Additional Information
   

  

**Work Personas**
 We approach our distributed world of work with flexibility and trust. Work personas (flexible, remote, or required in office) are categories that are assigned to ServiceNow employees depending on the nature of their work and their assigned work location. Learn more here. To determine eligibility for a work persona, ServiceNow may confirm the distance between your primary residence and the closest ServiceNow office using a third-party service.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 ServiceNow is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin or nationality, ancestry, age, disability, gender identity or expression, marital status, veteran status, or any other category protected by law. In addition, all qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with legal requirements.
   

  

**Accommodations**
 We strive to create an accessible and inclusive experience for all candidates. If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are unable to use this online application and need an alternative method to apply, please contact globaltalentss@servicenow.com for assistance.
   

  

**Export Control Regulations**
 For positions requiring access to controlled technology subject to export control regulations, including the U.S. Export Administration Regulations (EAR), ServiceNow may be required to obtain export control approval from government authorities for certain individuals. All employment is contingent upon ServiceNow obtaining any export license or other approval that may be required by relevant export control authorities.

title: Sr. Software Engineer – Ads Orchestration
description:
Hos TV4 möts teknik, innovation, nyhetsjournalistik, sport och underhållning.
   

  

 Varje vecka använder omkring åtta miljoner människor TV4 Play och MTV Katsomo. Reklamaffären är en central del av det som finansierar både våra streamingtjänster och det innehåll vi producerar.
   

  

 Nu söker vi en Senior Software Engineer till Ads Orchestration – teamet som bygger de produktförmågor som gör det möjligt att sälja, leverera, mäta och utveckla framtidens annonsaffär.
   

  

****Varför den här rollen är viktig****
 Vi moderniserar just nu hela vår annonsplattform.
   

  

 Från hur kampanjer säljs och bokas till hur de planeras, levereras, optimeras, mäts och följs upp.
   

  

 Samtidigt konsoliderar vi systemen bakom TV4 Play och MTV Katsomo till en gemensam nordisk plattform.
   

  

 Det här handlar inte bara om teknik.
   

  

 Det handlar om att skapa förutsättningar för att snabbare utveckla nya annonsprodukter, möta förändrade marknadsbehov och ge verksamheten större frihet att utveckla affären.
   

  

 Vi ersätter externa beroenden med egenutvecklade tjänster och bygger en plattform som kan utvecklas i takt med verksamheten under många år framåt.
   

  

****Varför du vill kliva ombord****
 Du vill vara med i ett team som äger mer än kod.
   

  

 Hos oss arbetar du nära produkt, användare och verksamhet för att förstå vilka problem som är värda att lösa och hur vi vet att lösningarna skapar effekt.
   

  

 Du trivs när teamet tar ansvar för hela resan – från idé och prioritering till implementation, lansering, uppföljning och vidareutveckling.
   

  

 Du gillar komplexa flöden, integrationer och affärskritiska processer, men framför allt motiveras du av att göra dem begripliga, användbara och värdeskapande.
   

  

 Du lockas av möjligheten att bygga nytt i en miljö där teknik, produkt och affär arbetar tätt tillsammans för att skapa verkligt värde.
   

  

 Du ser AI som ett naturligt verktyg i modern produktutveckling och är nyfiken på hur nya arbetssätt kan hjälpa team att lära snabbare, bygga smartare och skapa mer värde.
   

  

****Om teamet****
 Ads Orchestration skapar förutsättningar för en effektiv och framtidssäker annonsaffär.
   

  

 Teamet bygger produktförmågor som kopplar ihop behov från användare, kunder och partners med digitala flöden som skapar tydligt affärsvärde.
   

  

 Vi arbetar där teknik, produkt och annonsaffär möts – med målet att minska friktion, öka transparens och hjälpa TV4 utveckla annonsprodukter snabbare och mer träffsäkert.
   

  

 Som Senior Software Engineer blir du en del av ett tvärfunktionellt team med tydligt produktfokus och nära samarbete med stakeholders, användare och affärspartners.
   

  

****Vad du kommer att göra****
* Bygga och vidareutveckla skalbara tjänster i en cloud-native och modulär arkitektur
* Utveckla lösningar över hela stacken med tyngd inom backend
* Designa API:er och integrationer som kopplar samman produkter, plattformar och verksamhetsprocesser
* Bidra till arkitekturbeslut och tekniska vägval
* Arbeta aktivt med AI-verktyg i utvecklingsprocessen
* Ta ansvar för observability, monitorering och kontinuerliga förbättringar
* Samarbeta nära produkt, användare och stakeholders för att omsätta behov till fungerande lösningar
* Bidra till att forma nästa generation av TV4:s annonsplattform


****Om dig****
 Du är en erfaren fullstackutvecklare med tydlig tyngd inom backend.
   

  

 Du trivs i gränslandet mellan produkt, teknik och affär och motiveras av att bygga lösningar som skapar verkligt värde för användare och verksamhet.
   

  

 Du har ett ingenjörsmässigt tänk, uppskattar hög autonomi och gillar att arbeta i team som tar ansvar från idé till lansering och vidareutveckling.
   

  

 Vi tror också att du:
   

  

* Har minst 5 års erfarenhet av mjukvaruutveckling i moderna system, med tyngd inom backend
* Har erfarenhet av Node, TypeScript, React och molnbaserade lösningar
* Har arbetat med API:er, integrationer och användarnära delar av en produkt
* Trivs i tvärfunktionella team och arbetar gärna nära produkt, design, användare och stakeholders
* Är en god kommunikatör och kan förklara komplexa koncept på ett enkelt sätt
* Har anammat AI som verktyg för att höja kvalitet, lärande och produktivitet


 Det är ett extra plus om du har erfarenhet av domäner med komplexa flöden, integrationer och höga krav på spårbarhet, exempelvis annonsering, betalningar, orderflöden eller logistik.
   

  

****Nuvarande tech stack****
**Backend:** 
 Node, TypeScript
   

  

**Frontend:** 
 React, React Native
   

  

**Moln:** 
 AWS
   

  

**Databaser:** 
 PostgreSQL, DynamoDB, OpenSearch / Elasticsearch
   

  

**DevOps & Observability:** 
 GitHub Actions, Terraform, Grafana, OpenTelemetry
   

  

**AI & Developer Tooling:** 
 Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, CLI/MCP-integrationer
   

  

**Produktivitet:** 
 Linear, Notion, Slack
   

  

****Vad TV4 erbjuder dig****
* Kort väg från idé till beslut i en senior teknikorganisation med hög autonomi för både team och individ
* En kultur som värdesätter hållbara tekniska lösningar framför snabba genvägar
* Möjlighet att vara med och bygga nästa generations annonsplattform för TV4 och MTV
* Kollegor med hög teknisk kompetens och stort ägandeskap
* Du loggar ut på riktigt efter jobbet. Vi har dedikerad on-call där det är relevant och förväntar oss inte att du ska vara tillgänglig utanför arbetstid
* Modernt kontor med gym, restaurang, garage och takterrass
* Kollektivavtal, tjänstepension, försäkringar, friskvårdsbidrag, Benify, valfri telefon och MacBook Pro


****Praktisk information****
* TV4 är office-first och vi arbetar från kontoret fyra dagar i veckan
* Tillsvidareanställning med sex månaders provanställning
* Facklig tillhörighet: Unionen
* Bakgrundskontroll ingår i processen


 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan.
